items: Welcome by the School Board President

Oral Communication - If you have public comment related to a Regular Board Meeting item, please post it on: (https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSd3rKbPfVCTpOsK5ILqjnU2u-h-NuNx-vUq4OZxYNVR8lc4aQ/viewform?usp=sf_link) prior to the Regular Board Meeting or immediately upon the meeting opening.
Approval of $200,000 Movement from Program Contingency to Energy and Security Project
Approval of Encroachment Permit Fee for Taft School with the City of Redwood City
Approval of Generator Rental and Purchase Proposals for Orion Alternative School (Formerly John Gill School) with Peterson Power
Approval of California Environmental Air Quality (CEQA) Construction Oversight Proposal and Change Order #1 for Orion Alternative School (Formerly John Gill School) with SCS Engineers
Approval of Final Plan and Field Review Invoice for Kennedy Middle School Administration and Parking Lot Project with the Division of the State Architect (DSA)
Approval of Covid-19 Safety Compliance Officer (SCO) August Proposal and New Agreement for Active Construction Sites with The Safety Guys
Approval of Additional Vendors to be Included with Non-Public School ("NPS")/Non-Public Agency ("NPA") Master Contract
Approval of Agreement between Redwood City School District and Peninsula Community Center (PCC) for Fiscal Year 2020-21 (PE+ Program)
Approval of Agreement between Redwood City School District and Sequoia Healthcare District (Healthy Schools Initiative Grant)
Approval of Agreement between Redwood City School District and One Life Counseling (Increased Counseling Services)
Approval of Agreement between Redwood City School District and San Mateo County Office of Education for Library Services for 2020-21
Ratification of Warrant Register, August 1, 2020 - August 31, 2020
Approval of the Memorandum of Understanding between the Redwood City School District and the California School Employees Association
Approval of Variable Term Waiver Request
Report from Board Members and Superintendent
Information on San Mateo County Investment Fund - July, 2020
Other Business/Suggested Items for Future Agenda
Changes to the Board Agenda Schedule

llmResponse.agenda_changes: Multiple changes announced: (1) Item 8 moved into item 7; (2) All bond action items moved to bond consent; (3) All action items under section 11 moved to consent. Board President stated: 'I'd like to suggest we move agenda item eight into seven, and we make all the action items go to consent.' Trustee McAvoy agreed and added: 'the bond action items go to bond consent, and all of the items under 11 Action items to consent.'
llmResponse.consent_vote_words: So moved. Maria. Second. Cecilia, can we have a roll call vote, please?
